info.name: Ruderalis API
info.description: Medical marijuana ecommerce backend API collection for the Ruderalis platform.

variable.description: Set after vendor login (register with role:vendor via /user/auth)

item.name: Auth
item.description: User authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, profile management, password and pin management, and session control.

item.name: Products
item.description: User product management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting products.

item.name: Shops
item.description: User shop management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting shops.

item.name: Reviews
item.description: User product review endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting reviews.

item.name: Shop Reviews
item.description: User shop review endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting shop reviews.

item.name: Orders
item.description: User order management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and cancelling orders.

item.name: Payments
item.description: User payment endpoints for creating and viewing payments.

item.name: Promotions
item.description: User promotion endpoints for creating and viewing promotions.

item.name: Testimonials
item.description: User testimonial endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting testimonials.

item.name: FAQs
item.description: Public FAQ endpoints. No authentication required.

item.name: Messages
item.description: User message endpoints for sending and viewing messages.

item.name: Customers
item.description: User customer listing endpoints.

item.name: Shop Visits
item.description: User shop visit tracking endpoints.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Admin authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, profile management, password and pin management, and session control.

item.name: Users
item.description: Admin user management endpoints for viewing and managing user accounts, statuses, and permissions.

item.name: Shops
item.description: Admin shop management endpoints for viewing, approving, suspending, featuring, and managing shop statuses.

item.name: Products
item.description: Admin product management endpoints for viewing, approving, featuring, managing sales, and updating product statuses.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Admin order management endpoints for viewing orders and updating order statuses.

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Admin review management endpoints for viewing, toggling visibility, and deleting product reviews.

item.name: Shop Reviews
item.description: Admin shop review management endpoints for viewing, toggling visibility, and deleting shop reviews.

item.name: Testimonials
item.description: Admin testimonial management endpoints for viewing, toggling visibility, and deleting testimonials.

item.name: FAQs
item.description: Admin FAQ management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting FAQs.

body.raw:
{
	"question": "What is Ruderalis?",
	"answer": "Ruderalis is a medical marijuana ecommerce platform",
	"category": "General",
	"visible": true,
	"order": 1
}

item.name: Messages
item.description: Admin message management endpoints for viewing messages and sending replies.

item.description: Super-admin only endpoints for managing admin accounts.

item.description: Admin payment management endpoints for viewing payments and updating payment statuses.

item.name: Promotions
item.description: Admin promotion management endpoints for viewing promotions and updating promotion statuses.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Admin dashboard endpoints for overview statistics and analytics.

item.name: Vendor
item.description: Vendor endpoints for managing shops, products, orders, reviews, customers, promotions, payments, shop visits, and dashboard analytics. Vendors register via /user/auth with role:vendor.
